portfolio.title: Solutions
portfolio.heroTitle: More than consulting. A trusted link in health.
portfolio.heroText: More than a consulting or pharmaceutical representation company, GENQUEST is a trusted link between science and patients. Our purpose is to humanize the journey of access to rare disease medicines, connecting innovation and empathy in every interaction.
portfolio.carouselText1: We design access strategies for rare disease medicines, supporting incorporation and rational use decisions, always with a focus on the patient.
portfolio.carouselText2: We represent rare disease medicine manufacturers with ethics and transparency, bringing industry, health services and managers closer together.
portfolio.carouselText3: We work alongside patient associations, specialists and managers to strengthen the agenda for rare diseases in public policies and access protocols.
portfolio.carouselText4: We develop journeys, workshops and content on rare diseases, supporting health teams in continuous updates and earlier diagnosis.
portfolio.representationCardText: We act as representatives of rare disease medicine manufacturers, connecting industry, health services and managers with ethics, transparency and focus on responsible patient access.
portfolio.educationCardText: We develop continuous medical education initiatives, with content, workshops and training journeys aimed at early diagnosis, rational use of therapies and scientific updates.
portfolio.advocacyCardText: We work with patient associations, specialists and public policy makers to strengthen the rare disease agenda and expand sustainable access to treatments.
portfolio.accessCardText: We design and conduct complete access strategies for medicines, supporting regulatory, operational and decision-making processes with a focus on the patient's journey and treatment viability.

activity.partnersCardText: We build strategic partnerships with patient associations, specialists and public policy makers to strengthen the rare disease agenda and expand sustainable access to treatments.
activity.colaborationCardText: We develop a collaborative network with health professionals, managers and institutions to promote early diagnosis, rational use of therapies and scientific updates in rare diseases.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.heroTitle: Humanizing access to innovation in health
aboutUs.heroText:
Genquest was born with a clear and non-negotiable purpose: to humanize access to innovation in health, acting with responsibility, technical excellence and deep sensitivity to each patient's realities. More than enabling treatments, we seek to transform journeys that are often marked by uncertainty, bureaucracy and emotional vulnerability.
Our work is guided by reception and active listening. We accompany each step of the medicine access process individually, understanding that each case is unique and requires dedicated attention, clear information and safe conduct. We act as a link of trust between patients, health professionals, industry and institutions, ensuring that technical decisions are always aligned with real care for people.
With ethical and transparent action, Genquest combines regulatory knowledge, strategic vision and human commitment to make innovation in health more accessible, efficient and sustainable. Our focus is to ensure that scientific advancement reaches those who really need it, in time, with respect, dignity and positive impact on the lives of patients and their families.
aboutUs.methodologyText:
The Genquest Method begins with identifying the need for an imported treatment, followed by the medical prescription and then the company assumes the entire process until the patient receives the medicine and can begin care.
Throughout this journey, we perform demand mapping, access monitoring and individualized follow-up, ensuring a safer and more organized path for each patient.

integration.heroText: Continuous education in international pharmaceutical trade for:

services.heroText: GENQUEST is a link of trust between science and patients. Our purpose is to humanize the journey of accessing medications for rare diseases, connecting innovation and empathy in each interaction.
services.carouselText2: Full and regulated access to therapies through the import route in Brazil.
services.carouselText3: Modular framework specifically designed for rare disease therapies entering Brazil.
services.researchText1: Genquest is conducting structured research to understand the main challenges faced by patient associations, health professionals, payers and institutions in importing rare disease medicines in Brazil.
services.researchText2: The goal is to give voice to real sector experiences and generate concrete inputs for developing more human, transparent and efficient solutions for rare therapy access.
services.researchText3: The research is quick, confidential and does not require mandatory identification. Responses will be used in aggregate form and may support sectoral analyses and Genquest institutional materials.
services.researchText4: Your contribution is extremely valuable to strengthen the debate and help improve the access journey in Brazil.
services.ctaTitle: Ready to bring your innovative therapy to Brazilian patients?
services.ctaText: Work with Genquest - the only company that offers regulated and integrated end-to-end solutions for imported medicines in Brazil.

aboutUsPage.excellenceText1: Guarantee the quality, integrity and traceability of the product throughout the supply chain: from the selection and qualification of international suppliers, verification of certificates, control of transport conditions to final delivery to the patient or health institution.
aboutUsPage.excellenceText2: Ensure strict compliance with regulatory requirements of Anvisa, Federal Revenue and other agencies involved in customs clearance and health surveillance.
aboutUsPage.excellenceText3: Prioritize patient safety as supreme value: correctly identifying therapeutic need, continuously monitoring demand, preventing treatment interruptions and providing complete support for the start and continuity of medicine use.
aboutUsPage.excellenceText4: Promote education and transparency in foreign trade with patients, doctors, public/private institutions and health plans, reducing regulatory risks, delays and unnecessary costs.
aboutUsPage.excellenceText5: Maintain ethical and trusting relationships with global manufacturers, distributors, public and private importers, ensuring transparent negotiations, efficient management of international payments and delivery times compatible with clinical urgency.
aboutUsPage.excellenceText6: Implement and continuously improve the Quality Management System (QMS), based on risk, with performance indicators, internal audits, non-conformance analysis, corrective/preventive actions and constant team training.
aboutUsPage.excellenceText7: Commit to continuous improvement, stakeholder satisfaction (patients, prescribers, payers) and prevention of public health risks.
aboutUsPage.iconText: The dandelion is not just an aesthetic element of Genquest's logo. It is a conceptual symbol, deeply connected to the company's reason for being.
aboutUsPage.hope1Text1: The dandelion grows where almost nothing grows: cracks, arid lands, forgotten margins.
aboutUsPage.hope1Text2: Like patients with rare diseases, who often live in care voids, the flower represents life that insists, even when the system fails.
aboutUsPage.hope1Text3: Genquest is born exactly in these neglected spaces of the health system.
aboutUsPage.seeds2Title: 2. Each seed is an access journey
aboutUsPage.seeds2Text1: When the dandelion disperses, each seed carries the possibility of a new beginning.
aboutUsPage.seeds2Text3: It is a seed of access, cast to reach those who need it, wherever they are.
aboutUsPage.movement3Text1: The dandelion moves like the wind - it doesn't force its path, it finds paths.
aboutUsPage.movement3Item2: Connect industry, government, doctors and patients
aboutUsPage.movement3Item3: Create intelligent and viable solutions, without sterile comfort
aboutUsPage.movement3Text3: The symbol's lightness translates strategic intelligence with humanity.
aboutUsPage.knowledge4Text1: In popular etymology, the dandelion is also associated with traditional knowledge, healing, observation of nature.
aboutUsPage.knowledge4Text3: Transform technical, regulatory and strategic knowledge into real impact for real people.
aboutUsPage.sense5Title: 5. The deep meaning of the logo
aboutUsPage.sense5Text1: Genquest's logo communicates, without words, that the company:
aboutUsPage.sense5Item1: Does not treat medicines as commodities
aboutUsPage.sense5Item2: Does not see access as mere bureaucracy
aboutUsPage.sense5Item3: Does not lose sight of the patient at the center
aboutUsPage.sense5Text2: The dandelion is the visual metaphor for Genquest's mission:
aboutUsPage.sense5Text3: Humanize the journey of access to innovation in health, spreading hope where there was once silence.
